title: The Bliss Of Sorrow.
content:
Never dry, never dry,

    Tears that eternal love sheddeth!
    How dreary, how dead doth the world still appear,
    When only half-dried on the eye is the tear!

    Never dry, never dry,

    Tears that unhappy love sheddeth!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Johann Wolfgang von Goethe delivers a powerful performance in "The Bliss Of Sorrow."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
